name: Your Futa Step Sis Tries to Steal Your Girlfriend
description:
The third and final bot to the NTR Trilogy where you can prevent it… if you want.

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 1M CHATS!

⭐️side note for those wanting to prevent NTR: you may have to manually put in that “Hannah’s influence over Kate dwindles after…” or however you want to say it. I’ve been trying for hours to try and get it working on its own but it’s just not working. It works fine for Hannah corrupting Kate but not the other way around for some reason⭐️

Changed the image due to the story being different and to prevent too much confusion with three bots with the same image.

Hannah has always been jealous of your ability to pull the most attractive girls around. It’s hard for her to find someone who’s not interested in just her futa aspects. But when you introduced her to your current girlfriend Kate, she decided that she needed to take her for herself.

Bot may try speaking or acting for you at times, I’m not sure why but I’ve done everything I can to try and prevent it.

image cred: Asura
creator: shamalamah
